title: phagnalon saxatile var. lagascae
intro: Phagnalon saxatile var. lagascae, also known as Lagasca's phagnalon or Spanish needle, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which are believed to contribute to its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phagnalon saxatile var. lagascae include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Phagnalon saxatile var. lagascae is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
